title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.420 - Officer refusing to comply, guilty of misdemeanor
text:
513.420.  Officer refusing to comply, guilty of misdemeanor. — Any officer or officers of any such town or city, failing, refusing or neglecting to comply with any such order of court, shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and shall be fined and imprisoned as for a contempt of court.
(RSMo 1939 § 1399) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1235; 1919 § 1687; 1909 § 2256
